message:
fix: Use scoped vars in aug_assign Two-Flow check

Check actual inferred type (including scoped vars for function parameters)
before deciding whether to use PyValue methods for augmented assignment.

Logic: Use PyValue methods if:
1. Type is explicitly pyvalue/unknown, OR
2. Variable has uncertain confidence (Two-Flow system)

Exception: If we have a concrete type (float/int/bool) from scoped vars
with certain confidence (e.g., function params from literals), use native
operators.
